violations.text: Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods deli meat and cheese in the 1 door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The walk-in cooler and 1 door reach-in gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The glass sliding door for the freezer was observed with cracked glass and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Walk-in cooler door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2024
The sliding glass door of the chest freezer located in the back retail area was observed in poor repair (glass cracked). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2021
